ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Cynthia Gawley-Uy and Attorney Kurt Huysentruyt to appear on Nov-15-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: E. Prado. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Continued To Jun-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Continued To Apr-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Kurt Huysentruyt appeared by zoom for Personal Representative.

Mr. Huysentruyt apologized to the Court for the non-appearance at the last hearing, stated that it was mis-calendared, that a petition for additional time to administer the estate was presented for filing yesterday and requested a two-week continuance. Mr. Huysentruyt also stated that he filed a declaration regarding the inventory and appraisal, that the California assets were resolved, that they were minimal assets, that some accounts were held jointly or were collected under a small estate affidavit, and that probate was submitted here because the Decedent had assets in Ireland. In addition, Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the original will was lost, that Ireland has no procedure for probate of a lost will, that they were told by the Ireland Attorney that if Cynthia was appointed here, she could make a claim to the Ireland property and that they are at a standstill with Ireland. Furthermore, Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the documents they presented to Ireland were not acceptable to Ireland, that Ireland is asking for a grant of probate, and that he has asked for an example of what they want, but he has not received anything. The Court raised the issue of filing an inventory and appraisal showing no assets and instructed Mr. Huysentruyt to look out for communication from the Probate Examiner. Status on close of estate is continued to April 7, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Continued To Mar-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Cynthia Gawley-Uy and the Attorney Kurt Huysentruyt to appear on March 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Petitioner.

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that he spoke with Counsel for Margaret (Decedent's Sister) and that he was advised that she has no objections. The Court noted that the will was in the Petitioner's possession after the Decedent's death and that there is no need to rebut the presumption of revocation. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for December 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
